# Product Overview

Vnstock-go is the Go rewrite of the vnstock open-source toolkit for Vietnamese stock market data analysis and investment automation.

## Purpose

Provides programmatic access to Vietnamese financial market data including:
- Stock quotes (real-time and historical OHLCV)
- Company profiles and financial statements
- Market listings (HOSE, HNX, UPCOM exchanges)
- Market indices (VN-Index, HNX-Index, UPCOM-Index)
- Covered warrants, ETFs, mutual funds
- Forex, precious metals, and cryptocurrency data

## Target Users

- Go developers building trading bots and analysis tools
- Backend services needing Vietnamese market data
- Financial analysts and researchers
- Data engineers building data pipelines

## Key Value Propositions

- Static typing and compile-time safety
- Native concurrency for parallel data fetching
- Multiple data source connectors (VCI, KBS, DNSE, FMP, Binance, Gold)
- Export to CSV, JSON, Excel formats
- Free and open-source

## License

Custom non-commercial license for personal and research use. Commercial use requires author permission.
